plugins.name: vibe-hero
plugins.description: vibe-hero adaptive-learning plugin: MCP server + skills + organic observation intake. Bundles four skills (setup, quiz, status, learn), a UserPromptSubmit surfacing hook that checks the spool of recorded work observations, a PostToolUse hook that records observations into the spool, and an MCP server launched via npx from the published @vibe-hero/server package.
